names.ar: Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque)
names.en: Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque

dimensions.text: H. 17.5 cm (6 7/8 in); H. of face (forehead to chin) 5.2 cm (2 in); H. of modius 3.5 cm (1 3/8 in); depth 14 cm total (5 1/2 in) including 2.5 cm (1 in) of perpendicular attachment element extending beyond headdress

description.ar: Head, goddess Mut, protome مصرية قديمة، معروفة بـ«Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque»، تعود إلى عصر الانتقال الثالث, Kushite Period، (الأسرة الخامسة والعشرون)، مصنوعة من Cupreous metal وgold leaf وformerly inlaid، محفوظة حاليًا في متحف المتروبوليتان للفنون، نيويورك.
description.en: Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque — Head, goddess Mut, protome. Period: Third Intermediate Period, Kushite Period, Dynasty 25, dated to ca. 733–664 BCE. Medium: Cupreous metal, gold leaf, formerly inlaid. Dimensions: H. 17.5 cm (6 7/8 in); H. of face (forehead to chin) 5.2 cm (2 in); H. of modius 3.5 cm (1 3/8 in); depth 14 cm total (5 1/2 in) including 2.5 cm (1 in) of perpendicular attachment element extending beyond headdress. Country of origin: Egypt. Credit: Purchase, Liana Weindling Gift, in memory of her mother, 2008.

qa_pairs_ar.q: ما هي Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque)؟
qa_pairs_ar.a: Head, goddess Mut, protome مصرية قديمة، معروفة بـ«Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque»، تعود إلى عصر الانتقال الثالث, Kushite Period، (الأسرة الخامسة والعشرون)، مصنوعة من Cupreous metal وgold leaf وformerly inlaid، محفوظة حاليًا في متحف المتروبوليتان للفنون، نيوي

qa_pairs_ar.q: أين توجد Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque) حاليًا؟
qa_pairs_ar.a: تُحفظ Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque) في متحف المتروبوليتان للفنون في نيويورك.

qa_pairs_ar.q: إلى أي عصر تعود Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque)؟
qa_pairs_ar.a: تعود Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque) إلى الأسرة الخامسة والعشرون.

qa_pairs_ar.q: من أي مادة صُنعت Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque)؟
qa_pairs_ar.a: صُنعت Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque) من Cupreous metal وgold leaf وformerly inlaid.

qa_pairs_ar.q: من أين أُحضرت Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque)؟
qa_pairs_ar.a: أُحضرت Head, goddess Mut, protome (Head of a goddess, probably Mut, for attachment to a processional barque) من Egypt.
